stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
After approximately 15 minutes in the cruise, you begin your descent toward Oslo. The planned track takes the aircraft through a small, developing cumulonimbus cloud situated about 1000 ft above its base, between waypoints TITLA and XINLO. Immediately prior to entering the cloud, the Outside Air Temperature is observed to be +3°C. Based on these conditions, what degree of airframe icing can be expected while operating within the cloud?
